comment: Published lyrics by DuBose Heyward. Complex duet: Porgy (m1-m19), Bess (m21-m39), combined sections (m40+). Pipeline stacks both voices on shared melody. Heavy OCR garble in directions. Many gaps where pipeline lost notes or lyrics. Truth provides primary voice lyrics.

1.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'Bess, you From' (3 on 2n). 'From' is from later duet section. Published Porgy: 'Bess, you'.

2.comment: Pipeline stacked v1+v2: 'is my one wo for man ev' (7 on 4n). Published Porgy: 'is my wo-man'.

3.comment: Pipeline had 'now, mus' You' — 'mus'' is from later phrase 'you mus' laugh'. Published Porgy: 'now, You is,' on 4n (includes tied continuation).

4.comment: Pipeline stacked: 'Is You keep' (3 on 2n). Published Porgy: 'You is!' (second exclamation).

5.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 2n+6r. Published Porgy: 'you mus' laugh an' sing an' dance for' — 6 rests converted to notes via injection (#103).

6.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 4n. Published Porgy: 'two in-stead of'.

7.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 1n. Published Porgy: 'one.'.

9.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 2n. Published Porgy: 'Want no'.

10.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 4n. Published Porgy: 'wrin-kle on yo''.

12.comment: Pipeline had 'how be' missing comma. Published Porgy: 'how, be-'.

14.comment: Pipeline had 'of the past all' (4 on 4n+2r). Published: 'of the past is all done,' — 6 syllables but only 4 notes. 'all done,' on lost notes. Fixing note[3] from 'all' to 'is'.

15.comment: Pipeline had 'is' (1 on 2n) — garble/misplaced. Published Porgy: 'done.' (first of repeated 'done').

16.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 1n+2r. Published Porgy: 'Bess,'.

17.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 4n+1r. Published Porgy: 'my Bess! De real'.

18.comment: Pipeline had 'hap pi ness is Bess be' — 'Bess' is OCR of 'jes''. Published Porgy: 'hap-pi-ness is jes' be-'.

21.comment: Pipeline had 'Por gy' missing comma. Published Bess: 'Por-gy,'. Also direction garble ('TD', OCR trash) — not a lyrics fix.

22.comment: Pipeline had ''0' wo man' (3 on 4n) — ''0'' is OCR garble of 'I's', 'yo'' dropped. Published Bess: 'I's yo' wo-man'.

23.comment: Pipeline had 'now,' (1 on 3n+2r). Published Bess: 'now, I is,' — missing 'I is,'. Adding.

26.comment: Pipeline had ''less you sh de' — 'sh' is garbled 'shares'. Published Bess: ''less you shares de'.

28.comment: Pipeline had 'ar' (garble from 'poco rall.' direction). Published: no lyrics (transition). Clearing.

29.comment: Pipeline had 'es' (garble). Published Bess: 'Dere's no'. Providing correct pickup.

30.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 4n. Published Bess: 'wrin-kle on my'.

31.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 1n+1r. Published Bess: 'brow'.

33.comment: Pipeline had 'I no in'!' (garbled mix). Published Bess: 'how, but I ain'' — 'but' lost to missing note. Best 4 for 4n.

34.comment: Pipeline had 'You hear me say in', if' — 'You hear' merged into one token. Published Bess: 'You hear me say-in', if'. Splitting.

37.comment: Pipeline had 'For gy,' — OCR 'F' for 'P'. Published Bess: 'Por-gy,'.

41.comment: Pipeline had 'ev nin'' — missing leading apostrophe on ''nin''. Published Bess: 'Morn-in' time an' ev-'nin' time an''.

43.comment: Pipeline dropped 'Morn' and 'ev' — had 'in' time an' in' time an'' (6 on 8n). Direction 'PORGY' is character marking not lyric. Published Porgy: 'Morn-in' time an' ev-'nin' time an''.

44.comment: Pipeline had 'nier time an' win ter time;' — 'nier' is garbled 'mer'. Published Porgy: 'sum-mer time an' win-ter time;' — 1 rest converted to note for 'sum' via injection (#103).

45.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 1n. Published: 'Bess,' (held, addressing Bess).

46.comment: Pipeline had NO lyrics on 4n. Published Porgy: 'you got yo'' (from 'Bess, you got yo' man').

51.comment: Pipeline had 'NY i for ev er.' — 'NY' is garbled 'now', 'i' should be 'an''. Published Porgy: 'now an' for-ev-er.'.

52.comment: Pipeline had 's . the ls Jos' be' (severe OCR garble). Published Porgy: 'Dis life is jes' be-'.

53.comment: Pipeline stacked: 'gun, From a dis' (4 on 2n). Published Porgy: 'gun,' (end of phrase). Removing stacking.

57.comment: Pipeline mixed voices: 'You Oh Bess don'' (4 on 4n). Bess 'You' + Porgy 'Oh, Bess, don''. Published Porgy: 'Oh, Bess, don''.

58.comment: Pipeline had 'min' dose wo' (3 on 4n). Published Porgy: 'min' dose wo-men,'. Missing 'men,'.

59.comment: Pipeline had 'got' (1 on 3n+2r). Published Porgy: 'You got yo'' (from 'You got yo' Por-gy').

60.comment: Pipeline had 'you loves yo'Por gy,' — 'yo'Por' merged. Published Porgy: 'you loves yo' Por-gy,'.

63.comment: Pipeline had 'yo it' (2 on 2n+1r). Published Porgy: 'seen it' (from 'I seen it in yo' eyes').

64.comment: Pipeline had 'eyes Bess.,' — double punctuation. Published Porgy: 'eyes, Bess.'.

67.comment: Pipeline had 'through de years a,' — stray comma on 'a'. Published Porgy: 'through de years a-'.

69.comment: Pipeline had 'er' (garble). Published: no lyrics (transition after 'sing-in'.'). Clearing.

71.comment: Pipeline had 'ev min'' — 'min'' garbled from ''nin''. Published Bess: 'Morn-in' time an' ev-'nin' time an''.

77.comment: Pipeline mixed voices: 'man From dis min ute I'm tell' (7 on 7n). 'man' is from Bess's 'my man Por-gy'. Published Porgy: 'From dis min-ute I'm tell-in''. Providing Porgy v1.

79.comment: Pipeline mixed: 'From Oh, my Bes sie,' (5 on 5n). 'From' is bleed from previous phrase. Published Porgy: 'Oh, my Bes-sie,'.

80.comment: Pipeline had 'ute hap py' — 'ute' is Bess bleed from 'min-ute'. Published Porgy: 'we's hap-py'.
